example: As they waited for the meeting to start, colleagues confabulated about their weekend plans.
During the long car ride, the toddler prattled on about imaginary friends and adventures.
The opposing military generals agreed to parley in hopes of reaching a ceasefire agreement.
Instead of getting straight to the point, he tends to palaver endlessly, causing meetings to drag on.
The baby babbled happily, creating a stream of adorable but unintelligible sounds.
Despite being focused on the meeting agenda, he continued to prate about irrelevant personal anecdotes.
Despite the urgent deadline, he continued to jaw about unrelated topics, wasting valuable time.
The friends sat on the porch, sipping lemonade, and began to natter about the latest trends in fashion and entertainment.
During the meeting, the colleague continued to blab about unrelated topics, prolonging the discussion unnecessarily.
In the office, a colleague couldn't resist tattling to the supervisor about a minor mistake made by a coworker.
The colleague yakked on and on about their weekend plans, oblivious to the disinterest of others.
After not seeing each other for years, they sat on the porch and gossiped, eager to gab about their lives.
The presidential candidates orated passionately about their visions during the debates.
The passionate activist spouted about the importance of environmental conservation during the rally.
He faltered an apology when confronted about the mistake.
Frustrated by the unexpected setback, he couldn't help but bawl in anger.
He scoffed at the idea of ghosts.
Friends often banter about each other's quirks and habits, creating a lighthearted and enjoyable environment.
Ignoring her at the party was a deliberate attempt to affront her.
In the meeting, he couldn't resist gasconading about his sales achievements, making his colleagues roll their eyes.
After winning the championship, he couldn't help but crow about the team's victory for days.
In his stories, he tends to rodomontade about his achievements, making them sound more impressive than they are.
During the fishing trip, he tended to hyperbolize the size of the fish he caught, turning a regular catch into a legendary tale.
She decided to play up her strengths during the interview.
In the middle of the chaotic kitchen, the frustrated chef began to cuss while trying to salvage the burning dish.
The opposition party voiced vociferous complaints about the new tax policy during the legislative session.
During the debate, each participant was given a chance to opine on the proposed policy changes.
Despite his reservations, John proffered his opinion on the matter, hoping to contribute to the discussion.
During the discussion, she insinuated that her colleague was taking credit for her ideas without directly accusing him.
Philosophers often postulate hypothetical scenarios to explore the limits of moral reasoning.
The contract stipulates that the payment must be made within 30 days of the invoice date.
